candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line with full series; best representation of top-line revenue.
Major revenue component for a bank but less complete than explicit Total Revenue line.
Supplementary revenue bucket but not the primary total.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit ‘Total Revenue’ line as the primary top-line revenue measure.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Personnel-related overhead, classified as SG&A rather than direct cost of sales.
Aggregate operating expenses for a bank, but this is broader overhead, not a distinct cost of goods sold line.
Specific operating expense, not a general cost of goods sold / cost of sales line.

variables.notes: No distinct cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present in this bank income statement; direct production/service costs are embedded in interest and operating expense lines, so COGS is set to 0.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line with populated values; primary SG&A bucket per hierarchy rule (a).

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Component of SG&A, but hierarchy prefers the aggregated SG&A line when populated.
Label suggests SG&A-type costs but appears unpopulated in the preview; less reliable than explicit SG&A line.
Operating income, not an SG&A expense; should be excluded for SG&A mapping.

variables.notes: Follows rule (a): a populated explicit ‘Selling, General & Administrative Expenses’ line exists, so only that row is used for SG&A components.
No research & development expense line (or similar) appears in the provided income statement; XRD is treated as 0.

candidates.why: Primary aggregate interest expense line for the bank (negative values); best overall measure of interest expense.
Component of interest expense on customer deposits/loans; used if the aggregate line is unavailable for some years.
Component of interest expense related to securities; relevant fallback if broader lines are missing.
Residual interest expense component; good secondary fallback.
Specific interest expense on subordinated debt; further fallback.
Generic interest expense label (currently unpopulated in preview) that may hold historical data.

variables.notes: Priority list is ordered from the broad aggregate interest expense line to more specific component lines, to allow selection of the first non-missing interest expense per year.

candidates.why: Most appropriate single measure of book equity; appears as the consolidated equity line in the balance sheet.
Component of equity, but not the full shareholders’ equity total.
Equity component of a hybrid instrument; a subset of total equity, not suitable alone for BE.

variables.notes: Uses the ‘Total Equity’ balance sheet line as book equity. Minority interests are mapped separately via the dedicated minority interest line, so BE is intended to represent shareholders’ equity.

candidates.why: Explicit balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB.
Alternate label for minority interests; appears to carry the same figures but the total line is preferred.
Income statement flow of minority interest, not the balance sheet stock; not appropriate for MIB.

variables.notes: Maps MIB to the explicit balance sheet line ‘Minority Interests/Non-Controlling Interests - Total’, which represents non-controlling equity interests.
